title: Resolution Disaproving the Request of the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw for Authority to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Former Councilor Norvin L. Tamisin As Consultant on Human Resource Management with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Twenty Thousand Pesos (P20,000.00) for the Period January to December 2021. ( AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 02/22/2021)
